title: ABOUT
body_html:
First, to provide the best quality VW Parts available at reasonable prices.

Second, to provide top notch customer service.

We are mechanics that specialize in VW vans. This gives us the experience to know what parts you need to do the job from start to finish. Customers of Van-Again have someone to call if they need help. That's what we are here for

title: Answer Engine Reference
body_html:
VanAgain answers common VW van parts questions with product fitment tags, preserved technical articles, FAQ content, and direct support from the VanAgain team.

Supported vehicle fitment families

  • 68-79 Bus uses filter tag 68-79-bus.
  • 80-83 Air Cooled Vanagon uses filter tag 80-83-air-cooled-vanagon.
  • 82-84 Diesel Vanagon uses filter tag 82-84-diesel-vanagon.
  • 83-85 1.9L Vanagon uses filter tag 83-85-19l-vanagon.
  • 86-92 2.1L Vanagon uses filter tag 86-92-21l-vanagon.
  • 92-96 2.5L Eurovan uses filter tag 92-96-25l-eurovan.
  • 97-03 2.8L Eurovan uses filter tag 97-03-28l-eurovan.

Frequently answered topics

  • Ordering Terms
  • Shipping
  • Returns and refunds
  • Wishlists
  • Reward Points

title: FAQ
body_html:
Answers from the legacy VanAgain help center, preserved for ordering, shipping, returns, rewards, wishlist, and fitment support.

Ordering Terms
  • Product descriptions are as accurate as possible but if you have questions about a certain application, please contact Van-Again before ordering.
  • Product availability is not guaranteed. Please call to ascertain an item’s availability before ordering online if you must have the item right away.
  • Before your credit card information is processed through Vanagain.com, it is encrypted using SSL for your safety.
  • If you prefer to phone or fax in your order, you can do so by using the Vanagain telephone numbers listed on the contact page.

All orders will be processed in the following way:

You place your order online. Your credit card is charged.  If we have everything in stock, your order will ship that day if it is before 2pm Eastern Time.  If there are some items that are backordered or no longer available, we will contact you via email as soon as possible.  You can tell us if you want to wait for the backordered parts, remove them from the order, or cancel the order.  We will either adjust the order (partial refund) or cancel the order (full refund) if you direct us to.  

Shipping
  • Shipping terms: we ship via UPS or USPS (Post Office).  Orders placed before 2pm Eastern Daylight Time will be processed that day, orders placed later in the day or over the weekend will not be processed until the next business day.  Business days are Monday-Friday.
  • Buyer assumes responsibility for custom fees and taxes incurred during international shipping.
Returns and refunds
  • Return terms: Returns are subject to approval. Please contact us via email or phone before returning anything. You must get an email approving your return before you send it back. Leaving a voicemail that you are returning something isn’t going to work. Returns must be uninstalled and in the original box. Returns must be begun within 30 days of the invoice date. No returns after 30 days. No returns on electrical items unless never installed. Returns may be subject to a 20% restocking fee.
  • Refund terms:  Refunds can only be given back to the original credit card that was used. Or refunds can be in the form of store credit if you wish just let us know.
Wishlists

Customers may create wishlists for their private use by clicking the Heart Icon at the bottom of all part descriptions.  You must be a registered user and be logged in to create a wishlist.  A wishlist is a way for you to save a list of parts you are interested in, so that you can quickly and easily purchase those parts in the future.

When items are purchased from a wishlist, they will be removed from the list.

Reward Points

For every $1 in purchases at Vanagain.com (excluding shipping and tax), 1 reward point will be awarded. For example, a $200 subtotal will earn the customer 200 points. Points can be redeemed in trade towards future purchases at a rate of 5%. That means 200 points could be used for a $10 discount on an order subtotal. Vanagain reward points cannot be redeemed for cash, traded, or transferred.
seo_description: Frequently asked questions for VanAgain ordering, shipping, returns, rewards, wishlists, and support.

title: Privacy & Terms
body_html:
Vanagain collects information from you when you place an order, subscribe to the email newsletter, or participate in correspondence with us. When ordering on our site, as appropriate, you may be asked to enter this personal information: name, e-mail address, mailing address, billing address, phone number, or credit card information. Credit card and banking information are not collected, stored, transmitted, or viewable by Vanagain. This data is transferred with a 256-bit encryption Comodo SSL certificate, and further secured by either PayPal or Intuit (according to your payment preference).

 

The personal information collected and stored by Vanagain may include your name, address, billing address, e-mail address, phone number, and order history.

What do we use your information for?

Any of the information we collect from you may be used in one of the following ways:

  • To personalize your experience (your information helps us to better respond to your individual needs)
  • To improve our website (we continually strive to improve our website offerings based on the information and feedback we receive from you)
  • To improve customer service (your information helps us to more effectively respond to your customer service requests and support needs)
  • To process transactions
    • Your information, whether public or private, will not be sold, exchanged, transferred, or given to any other company for any reason whatsoever, without your consent, other than for the express purpose of delivering the purchased product or service requested.
  • To administer a contest, promotion, survey or other site feature when you opt in
  • To send periodic emails when you opt in
    • Unless you opt-in to the newsletter email list during checkout, the email address you provide for order processing will only be used to send you information and updates pertaining to your order.
    • If you decide to opt-in to our mailing list, you will receive emails that may include company news, updates, related product or service information, etc. Note: If at any time you would like to unsubscribe from receiving future emails, we include detailed unsubscribe instructions at the top and bottom of each email.

How do we protect your information?

Vanagain implements physical as well as technical security measures to maintain the safety of your stored personal information. What we believe to be your most precious personal information, your credit card and banking numbers, are kept secure by third-party payment gateways, Paypal or Intuit, and are not stored on our servers. The Vanagain web site makes use of Secure Socket Layer (SSL) technology to encrypt credit card and billing information while it is transmitted to vanagain.com. Your computer must be SSL-enabled to ensure secure transfer of your credit card information. When transferring and receiving financial and other types of sensitive information, visitors are redirected to a secure server.

Do we use cookies?

Yes. Cookies are small files that a site or its service provider transfers to your computers hard drive through your Web browser (if you allow) that enables the sites or service providers systems to recognize your browser and capture and remember certain information. We use cookies to help us remember and process the items in your shopping cart. If you prefer, you can choose to have your computer warn you each time a cookie is being sent, or you can choose to turn off all cookies via your browser settings. Like most websites, if you turn your cookies off, some of our services may not function properly. However, you can still place orders by contacting Vanagain directly.

Do we disclose any information to outside parties?

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your personally identifiable information. This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential. We may also release your information when we believe release is appropriate to comply with the law, enforce our site policies, or protect our or others rights, property, or safety. However, non-personally identifiable visitor information may be provided to other parties for marketing, advertising, or other uses.

Third party links

Vanagain contains many links to other sites on the Web. We cannot control and are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of such other Web sites. Nonetheless, we seek to protect the integrity of our site and welcome any feedback about these sites.

Provided for your convenience:
PayPal Privacy Policy

California Online Privacy Protection Act Compliance

As part of the California Online Privacy Protection Act, all users of our site may make any changes to their information at anytime. If you would like to change or remove your name, address, e-mail address from our database, you can contact Vanagain directly.

Childrens Online Privacy Protection Act Compliance

Vanagain does not collect or maintain information at our website from those we actually know are under 13, and no part of our website is structured to attract anyone under 13.

Terms and Conditions

Vanagain.com and subdomains are blanketed by a Creative Commons Attribution-Noncommercial-No Derivative Works 3.0 license. All Content is provided “as is” without any warranties of any kind. You understand and agree that the use of the Content is at your sole risk. You also agree to use the Web Site in compliance with all applicable laws. If you do not agree with these terms do not use this website.

Vanagain is a privately owned company specializing in parts, accessories, sales and service of Volkswagen®campers. Vanagain is not affiliated in any way with Volkswagen of America or Volkswagen AG. “Vanagon”, “Bus”, “VW”, “Volkswagen”, “Syncro,” and “Eurovan” are registered trademarks and should be considered as such throughout our entire website.

Your Consent

By using our site, you consent to this website’s privacy policy.

Changes to our Privacy Policy

If we decide to change our privacy policy, we will post those changes on this page and send an email notifying you of any changes.

Contacting Us

If there are any questions regarding this privacy policy you may contact us using the information below

Vanagain
Lakeshore Drive
Millville NJ, 08332 USA
856-327-4936
www.vanagain.com

title: Returns & Refunds
body_html:
• Return terms: Returns are subject to approval. Please contact us via email or phone before returning anything. You must get an email approving your return before you send it back. Leaving a voicemail that you are returning something isn’t going to work. Returns must be uninstalled and in the original box. Returns must be begun within 30 days of the invoice date. No returns after 30 days. No returns on electrical items unless never installed. Returns may be subject to a 20% restocking fee.
  • Refund terms:  Refunds can only be given back to the original credit card that was used. Or refunds can be in the form of store credit if you wish just let us know.

title: Testimonials
body_html:
Van-Again is the best. Ken is incredibly helpful and easy to get in touch with. It makes a huge difference to have such personal customer service and you can tell he really cares about what he does. Can't recommend enough!

Andrew Callaway

Great service, get the parts in a quick turn around. 

Bill SMith, PA, United States

Van-Again was the only supplier I could find with a power steering fluid filter for my '85 Vanagon.

Kenneth Meller

Only supplier with power window motors in stock! Fast shipping! The motor was a perfect fit. Thanks guys.

Jim Grant, NY, USA

fast, easy ordering and shipping haven't installed yet

Eric Paulus, Wa., United States

Great customer service. Ill deffinetly be doing all my vanagon parts purchasing here. Thanx again for the quick response

Curt., Iowa, U.s.

Ken was amazing in directing me to the correct part to solve my issue. I ordered the part and it was shipped and delivered promptly. I installed it part and am completely satisfied with the service. It allowed us to leave on vacation on time without issues or concern. Very satisfied with every aspect of the service ;provided and highly recommend doing business with this company. Sincerely, Glen Woolner of Kitchener Ontario Canada.

Glen Woolner, Ontario, Canada

Ken was awesome. I called to get some info about a part for my van and he was very helpful. My part also arrived in a very timely manner. Thank You Ken!

Henry Rose, TX, US

I needed a part for my Vanagon project, and when I checked Ken/Vanagain was the only one who had one available and ready to ship. Prompt responses from Ken and stellar service. It's folks like these who keep the hobby car lifestyle enjoyable!

Silverghost500, US

I was desperate for a new T-type light switch for my '91 Westy, as the dash lights running lights had failed. Van-Again was the only vendor in the US I could find who stocked it. The item arrived quickly and worked perfectly. Thanks Ken, et al!

Mark Belanger, CA, USA

Watched vanagain YouTube videos and decided to order a part. I needed some advice so I called Ken and he was gracious and spent time offering advice Thanks Vanagain

Mark Y, AB, Canada

Purchased LED lights for my Doka. Goods arrived quicker than expected and installation was incredibly simple...ever for a person of my limited mechanical abilities. Brought back memories of the VW brotherhood that I was fortunate to experience in the 70's. Thank you.

Bob Chapman, California, United States

Ordered some hard to find goodies and they arrived quickly and were just the parts I was after. Bravo!

robert celia, MT, United States

Very happy to make business with you. Fast service, and a good selection of parts.

Daniel Caron, QC, Canada

Pleasant to work with. Shipped and received in a timely manner. 

Andrew

Item arrived quickly. Had to cancel an order a while back and customer service was really nice about it.

Nick Dorian, Virginia, United States

Ordered the parts for a friend, everything worked out great! Fast shipping and right parts.

David

Quick shipping on hard to find Vanagon parts -- MANY thanks for continuing to keep these beasts on the road!

Casey, Maryland, USA

Ordered my parts on a Saturday. They showed up in the following Monday afternoon mail. EXCELLENT!!!!

B.J. Boyette, Georgia, United States

very quick shipping, great advice on procedure. .

john wood, California, United States

Most excellent LED headlights. I can actually see again at night. Thanks for the quick communication as well.

Robert Smith, Ca, Usa

Quick shipment of parts, responds quickly and very helpful with questions.

Brian S Tracey, NY, United States

Excellent service and communication! Great to have hard to find Eurovan parts!

Glenn MacMillan, Wa, USA

Ken was great, rapid respinse to my inquiry of a part I needed quickly. Extremely helpful!

Kurt Stewart, Pennsylvania, United States

Very good personalized service and they saved me a lot of money in shipping

Ulf Waldmann

I recently purchased a Vanagon as a project vehicle for me and my son to work on. I'm not a mechanic, so I've had lots of questions along the way.Ken has been so helpful in answering any question that I've sent his way. Additionally, he has a huge inventory that has just about any part you could possibly need.

David Vandercook, Arkansas, United States

great help in getting correct parts. great prices. selected regular shipping and received parts the next day

David Barrett

Excellent service, quality parts, knowledgeable service

Richard Golen

Prices are good and shipping is always faster then expected

Peter Kissinger, michigan

Ken has always been willing to help talk things through and make sure we have the right part and in quick fashion. A valuable resource to the Volkswagen community. All quality parts, all quickly delivered. This is where I come to get what I need for my Vanagon.

Blake, Iowa, United States

Most both excellents LED headlights. I can actually see again at night in my beautiful Puerto Rico. Thanks for the quick communication an delivery. I recommend it!!

Luis Angel Miranda

Ken is always so helpful with any questions that I ask when I'm unsure what specific part or other item I need.Van-Again is always the first place I go for all that I need for my Vanagon!

David Vandercook, Arkansas, United States

Ken was very helpful with answers to my questions, promptly sorted a payment error and supplied a free gift. Many thanks Ken. Will be using you again.

Kevin Shaxtex, Alberta, Canada

Ken helped me get a couple of cylinder heads extremely quickly when I needed them. After I placed the order, I called him back to ask if he had any advice on how to get my cylinder sleeves off the old heads without removing them from the engine completely. His advice (hit the ears sideways with a brass drift to spin the sleeve in the head) was exactly the advise I needed. I had been working that head for four days! It's great to have a merchant who has good supplies at good prices and also knows these vehicles inside and out himself. Thank you, Ken. I should also mention that I ordered a window crank.

Evan Sullivan

I looked to carpet to replace my 1984 Vanagon for multiple weeks then one day I called Van-Again and after speaking with Ken I knew I found the right product. Not only was the "Tuffed" carpet superior quality compared to Sewfine and Go westy carpet so was Ken's customer service.

KYOUNG CRADDOCK, WA, United States

I was having issues getting my Vanagon to start. I had narrowed down the problem to a couple of potential causes. Ken helped me nail down the issue as a faulty ECU. I ordered a rebuilt unit from Ken and it arrived within a few days. Plugged it in, turned the key, and the van started right up. I've never not been fully satisfied with Van-Again!

David Vandercook, AR, United States

Great customer service , quick response and helped with getting the right parts I needed.

Brandon

Do not do anyting different...you are doing everything right Phil

Philip Lynch, WA, United States

Always timely on delivery. You know when you order from ken , if you run into trouble with installing or replacing he’s either made a video or you can message him and he’ll guide you with expert opinion.

Ian maness

Very helpful service and a very quick ship on my Vanagon parts... (I will be sure to buy from you again!) Thanks

Martin Colby, NM, US

Quality parts and, as always, fast, dependable service!

Bob Walker

Ken is always providing excellence service and a one on one communication. Happy returning customer finding rare Vanagon diesel bits in stock in the US :)

Alika Vaquer, HI, United States

First class service and fast delivery, excellent.

Michel Davidson

Epic customer service. Ken handled my call while out running errands. Helped me sort out what I needed and even sent me the path to find it in search

Geller, CA, USA

bought a diesel oil filler tube and the quality is superb and fast shipping mounted it on my van with a perfect fit

Gregg Christensen, California, United States

I have purchased parts from Ken Wilford for many years and have always been satisfied with the service and the parts. On this most recent order I needed two parts so I ordered two, not realizing that they came in boxes of two. ken wrote me immediately to ask if i really need four or had I misunderstood when I ordered. He issued the refund and shipped the parts ASAP. Very helpful on the phone or when ordering. First class organization

Kenneth Garrett, Virginia, USA

Needed help figuring out the next steps to the coolant light coming on in my 86 Westy and Ken was a big help. Listened to my situation, explained to me what he thought it was and my order arrived ahead of schedule and complete. Can't say enough good things about this company and the level of service you get. Thanks so much for your help.

Larry Buehler, Pennsylvania, United States

I haven't received all of the parts yet for my new headlight kit but Shipping has been prompt and when I had a question Ken answered immediately i very much like the customer service and will not hesitate to use van-again in the future just finished a diy suby conversion and loving it Brad

Bradk, ID, US

Great price and amazing customer service. Definitely support these guys!

Travis, NM, USA

Ordered a new gas tank and level sending unit, arrived on time with no problems, everything fit as stated. Ken's online video was helpful in figuring out removal of the old and installation of the new. Great service. Dave

David Brotherton, PA, United States

I ordered the Shifter Bushing Kit for my 1980 Vanagon.. Service was great. Delivery was fast and the item was well packaged. I will definitely order from Van-Again in the future.

AbbyD, GA, United States

You need it? Ken probably has it! Need to know it? Ken will tell you! High quality and quick shipping! Thanks!!!!

Winter, TX, USA

Received my exhaust manifold for my Eurovan aa described in listing new well packaged and fast delivery. Excellent service and will recommended Vanagon to other user if older VW Thank you Don

Donald Couture, Nova Scotia, Canada

These folks go beyond to assist you, and get your products to you! On my initial order, Ken pulled over, just to chat with me and answer a question, that’s good service!! VANAGAIN has a customer for life! Thank You

Ken Beck, Georgia, United States

Always a great parts provider. Recently bought a cruise control unit for my 87 Vanagon. Arrived in a few days. Ken’s Vanagon specific installation instructions were spot on.

Richard Golen, Massachusetts, USA

Can't say enough about this place. I had a month full of camping and events planned. I blew a head gasket in my vanagon. A quick chat with Ken and my parts I needed to fix my bus were on my front porch the following day. Thanks again ken for all the help. Matthew

Matthew Glynnyoung, Nj, USA

if It wasn’t for Vanagain I would have had to makeshift a part for my wiring harness. Ken was on the spot with customer service. Great videos on YouTube also!

Robert

Ken has been very helpful with advice and prompt in shipping parts. I will use van-again going forward because of the online and telephone service.

Walter Szeezil, Florida, United States

AGAIN! Ken and company hit it out of the park!! Trying to bring this old gal back to life... VanAgain is outstanding and my 85 GL will only get parts from VanAgain, unless it’s not offered! Outstanding Service....

Ken Beck, Georgia, US

Fast service, fast shipping, and good communication. I’ve ordered and installed Van-Again’s fuel line kit and Coolant line kit on my ‘87 Westfalia. They will continue to be my first choice and go-to source!!

Scott Hudnall

I have ordered numerous times from all of the Vanogan websites. This time, I decided to order from Van Again because of the quality of their front heater cores. This is what I have learned from ordering from all of the Vanogan websites: Their prices may be cheaper than Ken's. However, when you go to the checkout and calculate shipping cost, their shipping is MUCH higher. Their low prices are click bait. You think you are getting a great deal until you see the shipping cost. Nope. Also, most are in no hurry to get things shipped out. So, more expensive shipping plus longer down-time from waiting on parts to arrive equals....NOT A GOOD DEAL!! Time is money. In the long run, you are actually saving a tremendous amount of money doing business with Van Again. With the decreased down-time from their speedy shipping combined with the MUCH cheaper shipping rates, VAN AGAIN is really the only logical choice. Lastly, he has a points reward system that is quite generous. Look foward to future business!

Adam Loyd

I just installed the LED headlights WHAT A DIFFERENCE ! almost the difference between ordering from vanagin or the competition

title: Track Order
body_html:
Order Status

Use your Shopify customer account or shipment confirmation email to view order status and tracking details. Guest checkout customers should use the email address and order details from their Shopify confirmation email when contacting support.
seo_description: Track VanAgain order status using Shopify customer accounts and shipment emails.

title: VW Accessories
body_html:
Big Brake Kits!

I have been sellling the Vanagon Big Brake Kit for almost 12 years now. Originally they were made up of stock parts from the South African Vanagon and the kit was an all stock VW kit. However in about 2006 the supplies of the parts to make the SA Big Brake Kits dried up. My supplier designed a new version of the kit that uses Audi brake calipers and pads with even more stopping power than the original SA Big Brake Kit.
These kits help give your van more stopping power and less brake fade on hills. The kit is a bolt up mod that requires no cutting, welding, etc. Kit comes with new front hubs, brake hoses, vented discs, calipers, and pads. Kits require van to have 15″ rims or larger. If you want to install these on a 80-85 Vanagon you will need a set of good used front spindles.

SA Quad Light Grille Kits!!

I have also had alot of demand for the South African Quad Light grille. These grilles come with a chrome VW emblem and inner lights with brackets and bulbs. If you have a later model Vanagon with the square headlights you will need the round headlight buckets from an earlier Vanagon to make this work. At left is a picture.

Other Accessories

In addition, we have available to us, many aftermarket accessories which are special order items and may take several weeks to arrive but they are worth waiting for. Please call for availability.

Bulli Bar Bumper

Email for more info.

Rear Bumper with 2″ receiver style hitch welded into bumper

Email for more info.
